acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Dirty, unreadable and unpublished Git workspaces survive cleanup
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Removal fails closed unless Git state is readable, clean and published; regression tests cover every branch.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Interrupted partial clones are not mistaken for healthy workspaces
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Configured Git directories missing .git are preserved as adjacent orphan paths and reconstructed; removal fails closed.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A lost X1 can resume from GitHub
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Checkpoints are bounded/redacted, run state reads the remote projection, and pending chains rebase atomically without changing event identity.
RFC 8785 string escapes use lowercase hexadecimal and properties sort by UTF-16 code units; control/non-BMP cross-runtime fixtures pass.
Receipts collapse to per-run watermarks; confirmed stale event/batch files are removed; unconfirmed events are never compacted.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Provider failures cannot create retry storms
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: One process-wide circuit covers every game-api operation, honors bounded Retry-After and permits only one half-open probe.
Decoded and string-encoded 409/422 bodies preserve recoverable error codes for remote-state reconciliation.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Tests cannot race the live audit outbox
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Test startup allocates an isolated temporary outbox before the application starts.
Cached and uncached input, output and reasoning tokens are separated and provider watermarks reset per App Server session.
Non-critical batches use the contract maximum of 50 events while critical boundaries still flush immediately.

checks.name: make all
checks.summary: 297 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped; 100% coverage; format, specs, Credo and Dialyzer passed.

checks.name: installed runtime
checks.summary: Verified escript installed separately from the portable launcher and user service restarted successfully.

checks.name: real audit replay
checks.summary: BOS Front advanced from confirmed sequence 9,617 through the recovered chain; the idle outbox reached zero pending events/batches and 632 KB.

residualRisk.risk: GitHub provider quotas can still pause the control plane
residualRisk.mitigation: Global circuit, 50-event batches and bounded Retry-After prevent storms; quota exhaustion remains visible and reversible.

summary: Symphony now fails closed around workspace loss, reconstructs from canonical GitHub state, emits cross-runtime valid audit chains, bounds local state and upstream traffic, and measures token/cache behavior.
